title: daemon/store: burn_on_read in read_message non-atomic (SELECT then DELETE without transaction)
description: daemon/src/store.rs:1937: read_message reads burn_on_read in one statement then calls hard_delete_message in a second statement with no transaction lock. Two concurrent calls on the same burn-on-read message_id can both observe burn!=0 and both attempt hard_delete_message. Fix: wrap in BEGIN IMMEDIATE transaction, or use a single atomic DELETE FROM message WHERE id=? AND burn_on_read=1 RETURNING id and check if a row was returned.
close_reason: Fixed in round 31: DELETE...RETURNING makes burn_on_read atomic
